buildSummary: Chaos DoT carry—keep Nightmare uptime, swap stances with Flavor Variation, and detonate with her ultimate once stacks are ready.

diskSets.name: Chaos-focused S Arc (TBD on banner)
diskSets.note: Prioritize ATK%, Crit Rate, and Crit DMG lines that reward sustained Nightmare damage.

diskSets.name: Flexible A Arc placeholder
diskSets.note: Use a solid A-rank Chaos or neutral damage Arc until her signature is refined.

modules.name: S-tier Module line
modules.note: Attack and crit substats amplify detonation windows.

modules.name: A-tier Module fallback
modules.note: Attack and cycle rate placeholders while you farm Hard Rewind pulls.

skillPriority.scales: Working Day Judgement—main AoE detonation and Nightmare application.
Morning Tomato—Nightmare setup and combo entry.
Tomato Metal / Tomato Percussion chains and shatter procs.
Microwake—swap-in area damage and filler cycle.

farming.name: Esper EXP materials
farming.tip: Level Lacrimosa before pushing module gambling—Awakening 3 is her biggest spike.

farming.name: Weapon/Arc upgrade mats
farming.location: Bubble Can Factory > Arc ascension materials
farming.tip: Farm ascension mats on days matching her Arc element route.

farming.name: Module enhancement chips
farming.location: Rabbit Hole > Carrota Rewind (Hard at Hunter 30)
farming.tip: Pair with Incantation or Psyche supports for Discord Esper Cycle reactions.

seo.title: Lacrimosa build guide
seo.description: Chaos DoT carry—keep Nightmare uptime, swap stances with Flavor Variation, and detonate with her ultimate once stacks are ready.
